title: The Seeds Act, 1966
full_text: The Seeds Act, 1966 बीज अधिनियम, 1966 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196654 Act Number: 54 Enactment Date: 1966-12-29 Act Year: 1966 Short Title: The Seeds Act, 1966 Hindi Title: बीज अधिनियम, 1966 Long Title: An Act to provide for regulating the quality of certain seeds for sale, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 02-09-1968 Notification: 2nd September, 1968, vide notification No. S.O. 3122, dated 29th August, 1968, in respect of ss. 1 to 6, ss. 8 to 11, s. 18, ss. 22 to 25 see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). 1st October, 1969, vide notification No. S.O. 4049, dated the 24th September, 1969, in respect of ss. 7, 12 to 17 (both inclusive) and 19 to 21 (both inclusive), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Seeds Act, 1966 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Central Seed Committee. Section 4. Central Seed Laboratory and State Seed Laboratory. Section 5. Power to notify kinds or varieties of seeds. Section 6. Power to specify minimum limits of germination and purity, etc. Section 7. Regulation or sale of seeds of notified kinds or varieties. Section 8. Certification agency. Section 8A. The Central Seed Certification Board. Section 8B. Other Committees. Section 8C. Proceedings of Board or Committee not to be invalid by reason of any vacancy therein. Section 8D. Procedure for Board. Section 8E. Secretary and other officers. Section 9. Grant of certificate by certification agency. Section 10. Revocation of certificate. Section 11. Appeal. Section 12. Seed Analysts. Section 13. Seed Inspectors. Section 14. Powers of Seed Inspector. Section 15. Procedure to be followed by Seed Inspectors. Section 16. Report of Seed Analyst. Section 17. Restriction on export and import of seeds of notified kinds or varieties. Section 18. Recognition of seed certification agencies of foreign countries. Section 19. Penalty. Section 20. Forfeiture of property. Section 21. Offences by companies. Section 22. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 23. Power to give directions. Section 24. Exemption. Section 25. Power to make rules.
